install_cmds: pip install scikit-learn==1.5.2 numpy scipy joblib pandas umap-learn==0.5.7 trimap==1.1.4 pacmap==0.7.3 numba llvmlite pynndescent econml pyod aif360==0.6.1

mkdir -p /data/adbench && python -c "import urllib.request, os; base='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Minqi824/ADBench/main/adbench/datasets/Classical'; [urllib.request.urlretrieve(f'{base}/{f}', f'/data/adbench/{f}') for f in ['6_cardio.npz','38_thyroid.npz','30_satellite.npz','32_shuttle.npz']]"
python -c "from sklearn.datasets import load_breast_cancer, load_diabetes, fetch_california_housing; load_breast_cancer(); load_diabetes(); fetch_california_housing(data_home='/data/sklearn')"
python -c "from sklearn.datasets import fetch_20newsgroups; fetch_20newsgroups(subset='all', data_home='/data/sklearn')"
python -c "from sklearn.datasets import fetch_openml; fetch_openml('mnist_784', version=1, data_home='/data/sklearn', parser='auto')"
python -c "from sklearn.datasets import fetch_openml; fetch_openml('madelon', version=1, data_home='/data/sklearn', parser='auto')"
python -c "from sklearn.datasets import fetch_openml; fetch_openml('Fashion-MNIST', version=1, data_home='/data/sklearn', parser='auto')"
local_install_cmds: pip install scikit-learn==1.5.2 numpy scipy joblib pandas umap-learn==0.5.7 trimap==1.1.4 pacmap==0.7.3 numba llvmlite pynndescent econml pyod aif360==0.6.1

mkdir -p /data/adbench && python -c "import urllib.request, os; base='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Minqi824/ADBench/main/adbench/datasets/Classical'; [urllib.request.urlretrieve(f'{base}/{f}', f'/data/adbench/{f}') for f in ['6_cardio.npz','38_thyroid.npz','30_satellite.npz','32_shuttle.npz']]"

cd /tmp && python -c "from sklearn.datasets import load_breast_cancer, load_diabetes, fetch_california_housing; load_breast_cancer(); load_diabetes(); fetch_california_housing(data_home='/data/sklearn')"
cd /tmp && python -c "from sklearn.datasets import fetch_20newsgroups; fetch_20newsgroups(subset='all', data_home='/data/sklearn')"
cd /tmp && python -c "from sklearn.datasets import fetch_openml; fetch_openml('mnist_784', version=1, data_home='/data/sklearn', parser='auto')"
cd /tmp && python -c "from sklearn.datasets import fetch_openml; fetch_openml('madelon', version=1, data_home='/data/sklearn', parser='auto')"
cd /tmp && python -c "from sklearn.datasets import fetch_openml; fetch_openml('Fashion-MNIST', version=1, data_home='/data/sklearn', parser='auto')"
cd /tmp && python -c "import sklearn; print(f'scikit-learn {sklearn.__version__} installed successfully')"

data_deps.name: sklearn_datasets
data_deps.description: Sklearn/OpenML datasets plus AIF360 fairness datasets (adult, compas, law_school)
